name: Lobbying Expenditure Election

eligibility.description: Available to most 501(c)(3) organizations that are not churches or private foundations.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: 501(c)(3) organizations can make an election under section 501(h) to use a specific expenditure test for lobbying activities instead of the vague 'substantial part' test, providing more certainty in maintaining tax-exempt status.
